name: Network Security & Zero Trust
description: NAC (802.1X), micro-segmentation, and SASE — network access control, posture assessment, and zero trust enforcement.
quickTip: Collect ISE/NAC RADIUS accounting logs and install Splunk_TA_cisco-ise for structured data.

subcategories.name: Network Access Control (NAC)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco ISE TA (`Splunk_TA_cisco-ise`), Aruba ClearPass TA, Forescout TA, SonicWall Syslog, Cloudflare App for Splunk (Splunkbase 4501).

subcategories.name: VPN & Remote Access
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco ASA/AnyConnect TA, Palo Alto GlobalProtect TA, Fortinet FortiGate Add-On (`TA-fortinet_fortigate`, Splunkbase 2846) for SSL-VPN, Microsoft Remote Desktop Gateway syslog, Akamai Guardicore Centra syslog.

subcategories.name: Zero Trust / SASE
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Zscaler TA (`Splunk_TA_zscaler`), Netskope Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase 3808), Palo Alto Prisma Access TA (`Splunk_TA_paloalto`), Cato Networks Events App (Splunkbase 8037), Fortinet FortiGate Add-On (`TA-fortinet_fortigate`) for FortiSASE, Check Point App for Splunk (Splunkbase 4293), Broadcom Symantec WSS Add-on (Splunkbase 3856), Cloudflare App for Splunk (Splunkbase 4501), Forcepoint ONE SSE, SonicWall SMA, Microsoft Entra Conditional Access.

subcategories.name: Edge Security (WAF, Bot, DDoS)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cloudflare App for Splunk (Splunkbase 4501) with Logpush.

subcategories.name: Forcepoint Security
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Forcepoint Web Security (Splunkbase 2966), Forcepoint SIEM Integration (syslog key-value).
